run_summary.summary: Active thread on the Flexsteel & Steinhafels deal — Kenny and Ian Saunders (Popfly) locked in the 3-video filming timeline yesterday. Video 1 draft due by ~Apr 25, Video 2 early week of Apr 28, Video 3 after Kenny's parents fly home May 12 (filming May 13/14, posting by end of May per the agreement — Ian confirmed this works). Steinhafels store visit is Thursday Apr 24 in Downers Grove, IL. One action item: Kenny said he'd apply to the Popfly campaign link on Apr 17 so drafts can be uploaded for review — worth confirming that's done since drafts and the invoice both go through that platform.

suggestions.message: Kenny told Ian he'd apply to the Popfly campaign link on Apr 17. That's how you submit drafts AND the invoice — worth double-checking it's done before you start uploading Video 1.

deals.next_action: Film Video 1 (concept ready) + confirm Popfly campaign link is applied
deals.notes: [Apr 17]: Confirmed 3-video filming schedule with Ian Saunders (ian@popfly.com, Popfly). Video 1 draft ~Apr 25, Video 2 early week of Apr 28. Video 3 after Kenny's parents fly home May 12 — filming May 13/14, posting by end of May (per agreement; Ian confirmed OK). Steinhafels visit: Thu Apr 24, Downers Grove IL. Draft uploads + invoice processed through Popfly campaign link — Kenny said he'd apply Apr 17, confirm this is done.
deals.activity_note: Apr 17: Filming timeline locked with Ian (Popfly) — Video 1 draft ~Apr 25, Video 2 ~Apr 28, Video 3 post by end of May. Steinhafels visit Apr 24 (Downers Grove). Apply to Popfly campaign link to enable draft uploads.
